Name: Church of the Dawn
Description: Faction Profile: The Church of the Eternal Dawn

Hierarchy: The Paladin Orders (The Swords of Dawn)
Paladin Orders: Visual: A Mouse Paladin in full, shining plate armor, wielding a needle-thin rapier or a war-hammer made of a single bolt.
Inquisition: Role: The Secret Police of the Church.
Mission: To hunt down Hedge Wizards, Unsanctioned Sorcerers, Cultists.

Moon Cult.View: The Church views the Moon as the 'Sun's Mirror'—a lesser, sadder light, but necessary for the night.

Death Cult.View: The Church preaches that the Sun brings Life, but admits someone must tidy up after Death.

Hedge Wizards.View: Hedge Wizards are fools or worse agents of chaos that subverts peoples reliance on the church (not cool).

Magic Style.Abjuration: Blinding flashes, searing beams of heat, and 'Truth-Light' that reveals invisible enemies.
Magic Style.Healing: Faith Healing, faster but only heals flesh the body must rest to catch up.
